metadata.title: Discovering Mathematical Objects of Interest—A Study of Mathematical Notations
metadata.author: André Greiner-Petter, Moritz Schubotz, Fabian Müller, Corinna Breitinger, Howard S. Cohl, Akiko Aizawa, Bela Gipp
metadata.subject: -  Information systems  ->  Mathematics retrieval.Novelty in information retrieval.Information extraction.Recommender systems.Near-duplicate and plagiarism detection.
metadata.keywords: Mathematical Objects of Interest, Mathematical Information Retrieval, Distributions of Mathematical Objects, Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency, Mathematical Search Engine
